summary: Frontend testing iteration 9 - Layout spacing fixes verified. All 11 requested features pass: turntable section has proper 12px spacing from header (py-3 gap-3), visualizer is vertically centered between turntables (20px difference), no scrolling needed (body=800px, viewport=800px), all deck controls visible.
passed_tests: Turntable section has proper spacing from header (12px gap - not bunched at top)
Visualizer is vertically centered between turntables (20px center difference)
Deck controls visible on both decks: CUE, PLAY, SYNC
Pad Modes visible: HOT CUE, BEAT LOOP, SLIP LOOP, BEAT JUMP
Pads 1-8 visible and clickable on both decks
FX RACK visible with ECHO, REVERB, FILTER, DRY/WET knobs
Sampler buttons (HORN, SIREN, DROP, AIRHORN) visible and clickable on both decks
Track info bar visible on both decks showing 'KEY ---' and '--:--'
Center mixer visible with all knobs and faders (MASTER, CH1, CH2 controls)
No scrolling needed - body height equals viewport height (800px)
STATIONS button opens Radio Crate modal with genre tabs (HIP HOP, R&B, TRAP, SOUL)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' - accessibility improvement opportunity for station browser modal
context_for_next_testing_agent: v9 verifies layout spacing fixes: py-3 gap-3 added to main content (12px header-turntable spacing), visualizer container has minHeight 190px matching turntables (20px vertical center difference), pads use flex-1 to fill remaining space. All features from v8 remain intact.
